            // Default arrow icon for unknown tools
            const defaultIcon = `<svg class="client-tool-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                <polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"></polyline>
            </svg>`;

            const toolsHTML = filteredTools.map(tool => {
                const label = lang[tool.labelKey] || tool.id;
                const icon = toolIcons[tool.labelKey] || defaultIcon;
                // Disable client tools in template mode
                if (isTemplateMode) {
                    return `
                    <span class="client-tool-item disabled">
                        ${icon}
                        <span>${label}</span>
                    </span>`;
                }
                return `
                    <a class="client-tool-item" data-action="client-tool-action" data-tool-id="${tool.id}">
                        ${icon}
                        <span>${label}</span>
                    </a>`;
            }).join('');

            return `
                <div class="client-tools-section">
                    <div class="client-tools-card">
                        <h2 class="section-title">${lang.clientToolsSectionTitle}</h2>
                        <div class="client-tools-list">
                            ${toolsHTML}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        // ===================================================================
        // 5. EVENT HANDLING
        // ===================================================================

        function attachMenuHoverListeners() {
            // Mouseleave close behavior removed - menu now closes only via:
            // 1. Clicking outside
            // 2. Toggling automation switch
            // 3. Opening another menu
            // 4. Clicking a menu item
        }

        /**
         * Closes the pricelist dropdown if open
         */
        function closePricelistDropdown() {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById('pricelist-dropdown-wrapper');
            if (dropdown) {
                dropdown.classList.remove('is-open');
            }
        }

        function attachDropdownArrowListeners() {
            // Custom dropdown now handled via click events in handleGlobalClick
        }

        function handleGlobalClick(e) {
            const target = e.target.closest('[data-action]');

            // Handle clicking outside to close menus
            if (!target && !e.target.closest('.action-menu.show') && !e.target.closest('.pricelist-dropdown.is-open')) {
                document.querySelectorAll('.action-menu.show').forEach(menu => menu.classList.remove('show'));
                globalConfig.state.openMenuAutomationId = null;
                closePricelistDropdown();
                return;
            }

            if (!target) return;
            const action = target.dataset.action;

            // Ignore change-based actions
            if (['toggle-shop-enable', 'toggle-automation', 'toggle-custom-pickup'].includes(action)) {
                return;
            }

            switch (action) {
                case 'toggle-pricelist-dropdown':
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const dropdown = document.getElementById('pricelist-dropdown-wrapper');
                    if (dropdown) {
                        dropdown.classList.toggle('is-open');
                    }
                    // Close action menus
                    document.querySelectorAll('.action-menu.show').forEach(menu => menu.classList.remove('show'));
                    globalConfig.state.openMenuAutomationId = null;
                    break;
                case 'select-pricelist-option':
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const plId = target.dataset.value;
                    if (plId) {
                        globalConfig.state.selectedPricelistId = plId;
                        window.myop_cta_handler('assignPricelist', { pricelistId: plId, galleryId: globalConfig.state.galleryId });
                        closePricelistDropdown();
                        renderApp();
                    }
                    break;
                case 'trigger-wizard':
                    handleWizardComplete(target);
                    break;
                case 'close-alert':
                    hideOverlay();
                    break;
                case 'wizard-create-pl-and-close':
                    handleWizardComplete(target);
                    break;
                case 'edit-pricelist':
                    window.myop_cta_handler('editPricelist', {
                        pricelistId: globalConfig.state.selectedPricelistId || null,
                        url: `${globalConfig.data.urls.editPricelistBase}?id=${globalConfig.state.selectedPricelistId}`
                    });
                    break;
                case 'preview-shop':
                    if(globalConfig.state.isShopEnabled) {
                        window.myop_cta_handler('previewShop', {
                             pricelistId: globalConfig.state.selectedPricelistId,
                             url: `${globalConfig.data.urls.previewShopBase}/?pricelist=${globalConfig.state.selectedPricelistId}`
                        });
                    }
                    break;
                case 'toggle-action-menu':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const autoId = target.dataset.id;
                    const automation = globalConfig.data.automations.find(a => a.id === autoId);

                    // Close other menus first
                    document.querySelectorAll('.action-menu.show').forEach(m => {
                        m.classList.remove('show');
                    });
                    globalConfig.state.openMenuAutomationId = null;
                    // Close pricelist dropdown
                    closePricelistDropdown();

                    // Check if customAction is present (not null)
                    // Check for both legacy (customAction) and new (customActions) properties
                    if (automation && !(automation.customAction || automation.customActions)) {
                        // Custom action is missing/null -> Fetch & Show Spinner
                        globalConfig.state.pendingAutomationId = autoId;
                        window.myop_cta_handler('fetchcustomaction', { automationId: autoId });
                        // Replace the 3-dot trigger with a spinner in-place (no full re-render to avoid scroll jump)
                        const trigger = target.closest('.action-menu-trigger') || target;
                        trigger.innerHTML = '<div class="spinner"></div>';
                    } else {
                        // Data exists, just open the menu (always opens down)
                        let menu = target.querySelector('.action-menu') || target.nextElementSibling;
                        if (menu && menu.classList.contains('action-menu')) {
                            menu.classList.add('show');
                            globalConfig.state.openMenuAutomationId = autoId;
                        }
                    }
                    break;
                case 'automation-action':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('automationAction', {
                        automationId: target.dataset.id,
                        action: target.dataset.menuAction
                    });
                    // Close menu
                    const m = target.closest('.action-menu');
                    if(m) m.classList.remove('show');
                    globalConfig.state.openMenuAutomationId = null;
                    break;
                case 'add-automation':
                    window.myop_cta_handler('addAutomation', { url: globalConfig.data.urls.addAutomation });
                    break;
                case 'client-tool-action':
                    window.myop_cta_handler('clientToolAction', {
                        toolId: target.dataset.toolId,
                        url: globalConfig.data.urls[target.dataset.toolId]
                    });
                    break;
                case 'shop-help':
                    window.myop_cta_handler('viewHelp', { topic: 'shop-header', url: globalConfig.data.urls.shopHelp });
                    break;
                case 'automations-learn-more':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('viewHelp', { topic: 'automations-learn-more', url: target.href });
                    break;
                case 'edit-custom-pickup':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('editCustomPickup', { url: target.href });
                    break;
                case 'p2-learn-more':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('viewHelp', { topic: 'p2-warning-learn-more', url: target.href });
                    break;
                default:
                    console.warn('Unknown click action:', action);
            }
        }

        function handleGlobalChange(e) {
            const target = e.target;
            const action = target.dataset.action;
            if (!action) return;

            switch (action) {
                case 'toggle-shop-enable':
                    const enabled = target.checked;
                    globalConfig.state.isShopEnabled = enabled;
                    window.myop_cta_handler(enabled ? 'enableShop' : 'disableShop', { galleryId: globalConfig.state.galleryId });
                    renderApp();
                    break;
                case 'toggle-automation':
                    const autoId = target.dataset.id;
                    const isAutoEnabled = target.checked;

                    // UPDATE DATA MODEL
                    const automation = globalConfig.data.automations.find(a => a.id === autoId);
                    if (automation) {
                        automation.isEnabled = isAutoEnabled;
                    }

                    window.myop_cta_handler('toggleAutomation', { automationId: autoId, isEnabled: isAutoEnabled });
                    renderApp();
                    break;
                case 'toggle-custom-pickup':
                    window.myop_cta_handler('toggleCustomPickup', { isEnabled: target.checked });
                    break;
            }
        }

        function handleWizardComplete(target) {
            const newPL = {
                id: `pl_${Date.now()}`, name: "New Pricelist",
                galleries: 1, products: 0, revenue: 0, lastEdited: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
            };

            globalConfig.state.hasPricelist = 1;
            globalConfig.state.isShopEnabled = true;
            globalConfig.data.pricelists.push(newPL);
            globalConfig.state.selectedPricelistId = newPL.id;

            renderApp();

            window.myop_cta_handler('createPricelist', {
                galleryId: globalConfig.state.galleryId,
                newPricelist: newPL,
                origin: 'gallery'
            });
        }

        function updateCurrencySymbolTooltips_State3() {
            const symbols = document.querySelectorAll('.currency-symbol');
            symbols.forEach(symbol => {
                symbol.removeEventListener('mouseenter', showCurrencyTooltip);
                symbol.removeEventListener('mouseleave', hideCurrencyTooltip);
                symbol.addEventListener('mouseenter', showCurrencyTooltip);
                symbol.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideCurrencyTooltip);
            });
        }

        function showCurrencyTooltip(event) {
            clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
            tooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                const tooltip = document.getElementById('custom-tooltip');
                tooltip.textContent = globalConfig.data.currentCurrencyShortName || 'USD';
                const rect = event.target.getBoundingClientRect();
                tooltip.style.left = rect.left + window.scrollX + 'px';
                tooltip.style.top = rect.bottom + window.scrollY + 5 + 'px';
                tooltip.style.display = 'block';
            }, 500);
        }

        function hideCurrencyTooltip() {
            clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
            document.getElementById('custom-tooltip').style.display = 'none';
        }

        // ===================================================================
        // 6. INITIALIZATION (PRODUCTION READY)
        // ===================================================================
        // This runs on load to initialize the UI structure.
        // It uses defaultPageData which now has empty lists, so the structure renders but content is empty.

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
             console.log('Application Loaded. Waiting for window.myop_init_interface(config) call.');

             // Initial render with empty/default data structure
             // This ensures the table headers and layout are visible immediately
             window.myop_init_interface({
                 state: {},
                 lang: {},
                 data: {},
                 html: {}
             });

             // Listen for window resize to update iframe height
             window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                 notifyParentOfHeight();
             });
        });

    </script>
</body>
